description_long: This sconce features a striking, artistic design with a central conical or teardrop-shaped light diffuser in a warm amber color, surrounded by a series of black, spiraling metal rods that create a dynamic, open structure. The rods are arranged in a helical pattern, giving the fixture a sense of upward movement and modern flair. Flanking the central element are two elongated, pale lavender panels that add a touch of color and geometric contrast. At the base, a cluster of small, white, petal-like elements forms a decorative accent, enhancing the overall sculptural quality. The sconce's materials appear to be primarily metal and glass, with some translucent and opaque components. This fixture would serve as a statement piece in contemporary urban environments, blending functional lighting with artistic expression.
description: A modern, sculptural sconce with a central amber diffuser, black spiral metal rods, lavender panels, and a decorative white base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central amber diffuser, spiral black rods, lavender panels, and the clustered white base elements most clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the helical structure of the black rods and the elongated shape of the lavender panels.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the symmetry of the spiral rods and the arrangement of the lavender panels, with the amber diffuser partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the depth of the spiral rods and the layered arrangement of the decorative base elements.
attribute_fixture_design: Modern and artistic, featuring a dynamic spiral motif with geometric and organic elements, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
